pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 161 (docker-compose.yml): ports: ["8080:8080"] - host-facing port for frontend
verifier.py line 16 (docstring) and line 93: pass_threshold default value is 75

privileged_info_summary: This task is a Docker networking debugging exercise for a hybrid architecture with a legacy host-based service. The legacy inventory service runs natively on the host machine on port 9090, returning hardcoded JSON data with "item": "Retro Lamp". The project directory is /home/ga/projects/hybrid-migration. A Python 3.11 Flask backend (port 5000) and Node.js 20 frontend (port 3000) run in Docker containers. The task requires fixing network connectivity so the frontend is accessible on host port 8080 and can fetch data through the entire stack. All data used is synthetic, generated by the setup scripts. Task pass threshold is 75 points, with 900-second timeout and 60-step maximum.
